name: BuyWhere
description: Agent-native product catalog API for AI agent commerce

skills.name: Product Search
skills.description: Search Singapore product catalog by keyword, category, price range
examples: Find wireless earbuds under $200 in Singapore

skills.name: Product Comparison
skills.description: Compare products across merchants by price, rating, availability
examples: Compare iPhone 15 prices across Singapore retailers

skills.name: Deal Finder
skills.description: Find best deals and discounts across Singapore merchants
examples: Show me the best laptop deals today
